'''hangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachgirl|beachgirl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachgirl|beachgirl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hangaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængækæth|hængækæth]] || [[word:hængækæj|hængækæj]] || [[word:hængækæsh|hængækæsh]] || [[word:hængækæ|hængækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangangakath|hangangakath]] || [[word:hangangakaj|hangangakaj]] || [[word:hangangakash|hangangakash]] || [[word:hangangaka|hangangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangakath|hangakath]] || [[word:hangakaj|hangakaj]] || [[word:hangakash|hangakash]] || [[word:hangaka|hangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangafkath|hangafkath]] || [[word:hangafkaj|hangafkaj]] || [[word:hangafkash|hangafkash]] || [[word:hangafkaf|hangafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hangakatha|hangakatha]] || [[word:hangakaja|hangakaja]] || [[word:hangakasha|hangakasha]] || [[word:hangakaka|hangakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hangakath|hangakath]] || [[word:hangakaj|hangakaj]] || [[word:hangakash|hangakash]] || [[word:hangaka|hangaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hangakathal|hangakathal]] || [[word:hangakajal|hangakajal]] || [[word:hangakashal|hangakashal]] || [[word:hangakakal|hangakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hangakathatha|hangakathatha]] || [[word:hangakajaja|hangakajaja]] || [[word:hangakashasha|hangakashasha]] || [[word:hangakaka|hangakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hangakathan|hangakathan]] || [[word:hangakajan|hangakajan]] || [[word:hangakashan|hangakashan]] || [[word:hangakakan|hangakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hangakathaoro|hangakathaoro]] || [[word:hangakajaoro|hangakajaoro]] || [[word:hangakashaoro|hangakashaoro]] || [[word:hangakakaoro|hangakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
